$comment: Suite ledger (chapter 14 §14.2.5). Maps every ported test artifact from spec/reference/test-audit.md to the gate at which it must first be green. Skeleton written at G-P; per-file rows and their exact new paths are finalized when Phase 1 (G1) ports the estate. Before its gate a red/non-runnable artifact reports 'skipped (awaiting G<N>)'. At/after its gate, red = gate failure. Ratchet: once green, never skipped/red later. The schema-coverage allowlist (shared/ domains not yet landed) shrinks at every domain gate, empty at G9.

band2_fixture_swap.note: assertions unchanged; seeding-helper bodies rewritten to ch03 REST; onboarding also swaps one POST /api/v1/chat/runs stub

band3_served_app.note: 37 specs run UNMODIFIED against api/ alone; a failure is a byte-compat defect in the served-app plane, never a reason to edit the spec. legal-dossie also stubs /api/app-sso/me + /api/app-sso/m365/**

retired.note: behaviors re-covered by store-level unit halves + new schema-validated-stub specs at G9

band4_gap_plan.note: New specs from the ch13 §13.6 coverage-gap plan; committed at the gate that lands the backend surface, due green when the UI exists.

frontend_unit.census_note: 2026-07-10: registered 5 files that had accrued on disk unledgered (orchestration-persist-optout, sanitize-error, components/memory-page, components/usage-page, components/users-page — added by post-rc fix batches) plus the thinking-channel pair (orchestration-thinking, components/thinking-block); the count census was failing before this reconciliation. 2026-07-14: registered refusal-file-request (landed by the BRIEF-9a commit 8996048, whose message said 'ledgered' but never touched this list — the census was red again).
retired_as_static_audit: conversation-types (FC-109: deleted in W4 with its subject, the FC-107/108 client-side mode classifier + conversation-types module; §12.5)

test_client.note: ported first to the ch03 REST surface; the 14 drivers re-seed on it

drivers.name: erp-auth-ui
drivers.note: was G6->G9->CUTOVER. Targets the brasilsalomão ERP TENANT FORK (default APP_ID a machine-local fork UUID; emails @brasilsalomao.pt) with app-sso email/password gating + CRM + KYC + ops. The ported featured erp-imobiliario is a simpler financial+clientes ERP with NO app-sso email login (uses an accessCode gate; passwordSignIn/whoami/input[type=email] absent), CRM, or KYC - that fork is NOT in the ported reference catalog (spec §14.1 reference-access) and is reconstituted at cutover (§14.4, OUTSIDE this run). The G9 green ran against a non-committed local fork (ERP_APP_ID override); no committed content can satisfy it. Retargeted G9->CUTOVER (a post-run milestone) at G12 when the fresh e2e:server surfaced it. See RUN_LOG DEVIATION (2026-07-08, Phase 12).

drivers.name: erp-crm-persistence
drivers.note: was G6->G9->CUTOVER; same brasilsalomão ERP tenant-fork gap (prospects/propostas CRM not in the featured erp-imobiliario; fork out of the ported catalog, reconstituted at cutover). See RUN_LOG DEVIATION (2026-07-08, Phase 12).

drivers.name: erp-kyc
drivers.note: was G6->G9->CUTOVER; same gap (KYC dossier surface not in the featured erp-imobiliario; fork out of the ported catalog, reconstituted at cutover). See RUN_LOG DEVIATION (2026-07-08, Phase 12).

drivers.name: erp-ops-persistence
drivers.note: was G6->G9->CUTOVER; same gap (contratos/clausulas ops surface not in the featured erp-imobiliario; fork out of the ported catalog, reconstituted at cutover). See RUN_LOG DEVIATION (2026-07-08, Phase 12).

drivers.name: ifthenpay
drivers.note: was G4; G4 passed partial-domain (RUN_LOG G4) without the action-runner/platform-caller machinery this driver's execute step needs, and the driver still speaks the retired action API (FIXED-2) — retargeted to G8 (integration-execution) at the 2026-07-06 resume; REST adaptation owed there. See RUN_LOG DEVIATION.

drivers.name: invoicexpress
drivers.note: was G4; same as ifthenpay — rides the G8 integration-execution machinery; REST adaptation owed there. See RUN_LOG DEVIATION (2026-07-06 resume).

drivers.name: pipedream
drivers.note: was G4; the Pipedream REST layer (ch03 §3.8.16) did not land in the G4 partial-domain pass — module + adapted driver owed at G8. See RUN_LOG DEVIATION (2026-07-06 resume).

drivers.name: whatsapp-inbound
drivers.note: queue-acceptance at G5, full delivery at G8

drivers.name: action-registry
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run 20260712-150958: registry round-trip (issue -> visible execute -> destructive confirm -> cancel). Green from landing; ratchet applies.

drivers.name: assistant-modes
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run: scripted 3-mode assistant gate (automate/teach/answer incl. the CITED turn). Burns LLM turns - run deliberately, not in CI.

drivers.name: assistant-panel
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run: panel presence/mount/console gate on a served app.

drivers.name: tour-playback
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run: zero-token tour playback + rebuild selector stability (burns 1-2 builds).

drivers.name: assistant-billing
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run: billing-truth probe - identity-exact assistant-chat attribution to the owner ledger; tours/actions dual-proven free (burns builds + 2 turns).

drivers.name: fees-knowledge
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run: knowledge-during-build live proof (narration + build-ingest + cited answer; per-run token EKF-<runstamp>; burns 1 build + 1 turn).

drivers.name: panel-perf
drivers.note: feature-run operator-run: panel lazy-load perf gate - launcher immediate + no panel-runtime fetch before interaction, one fetch on click, tour still plays after lazy mount, zero assistant POSTs (burns 1 build).

drivers.name: edit-journey
drivers.note: security block H5 (authored by H5, run by the operator): served-app admin EDIT-MODE journey - whoami true -> opt-in (client-only) -> H1-gated follow-up patch run -> preview/diff (versions) -> approve -> rollback restores (forward-restore); AND a role:'user' session cannot reach edit (whoami false + POST /jobs follow-up 403 canEditApps). Budget: up to 2 builds (setup + patch-run, or 1 with EDIT_APP_ID) + 1 rollback restore.

drivers.name: request-changes-journey
drivers.note: security block H5 (authored by H5, run by the operator): request-changes queue journey - a user files from inside an org-shared app (route+screen context) -> lands in the OWNER org queue -> org-admin sees it with context -> convert starts an H1-gated patch run + links the jobId; folds in H4's live cross-org proof (a different-org user filing -> 404, no injection). Budget: 1 setup build + 1 follow-up build STARTED then cancelled (convert asserted at the API level, not awaited); 1 build with REQCHG_APP_ID.

contract_tests_from_ruleset.note: 23 direct-handler rule-set files rewritten as REST contract tests at their domain gates; mapping recorded in api/tests/contract/README.md

module_tests_146.note: carryover module tests travel with their module port (module-travels-with-tests rule). Group -> target gate.
